My Baby's Daddy (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,321,573Details
International Box Office $639
Worldwide Box Office $17,322,212
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,548,819 (43.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.29 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:100.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,447 opening theaters/1,448 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $33,360,064

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 9th, 2004 (Wide) by Miramax
Video Release: June 1st, 2004 by Miramax Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content, language and some drug references
Running Time: 86 minutes
Plot point: African Americans, Boxing, Delayed Adulthood, Interracial Romance, LGBTQ+, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Unexpected Families
Social setting: Music Industry
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Target audience: Asian-Americans
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
